name: python3-openpyxl
title: python3-openpyxl
summary: Python 3 module to read/write OpenXML xlsx/xlsm files
description:
Python 3 module to read/write OpenXML xlsx/xlsm files
Openpyxl is a pure Python 3 module to read/write Excel 2007 (OpenXML)
xlsx/xlsm files.
.
This package contains the module itself.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-openpyxl because Python 3 module to read/write OpenXML xlsx/xlsm files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-openpyxl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-openpyxl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-openpyxl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
